description: Transform the generic chat assistant into a specialty-recommendation triage system. Adds the CFM disclaimer (RN16), enforces single-recommendation rule (RN17), and structures the LLM response to be parsable by the frontend.

context.dependencies: Sprint 05 (Chat with Anthropic SDK) and Sprint 06 (Specialty enum) must be complete

prompts.name: triage-system-prompt
prompts.description: Create the centralized triage system prompt constant
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing file if it exists. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Create apps/api/src/chat/constants/triage-prompt.ts:

export const TRIAGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `Você é um assistente de triagem da plataforma Medicano, uma plataforma brasileira de agendamento de saúde.

REGRAS OBRIGATÓRIAS:
1. Você NÃO é um médico. Você NÃO faz diagnósticos. Você NÃO prescreve medicamentos.
2. Sempre comece a primeira mensagem com o aviso: "⚠️ Importante: este chat não substitui avaliação médica profissional. Em emergências, ligue 192 (SAMU)."
3. Sua única função é fazer perguntas curtas e claras sobre os sintomas do usuário e, ao final da conversa, recomendar UMA das seguintes especialidades disponíveis na plataforma:
   - medicine (medicina geral / clínico geral)
   - psychology (psicologia)
   - psychiatry (psiquiatria)
   - dentistry (odontologia)
   - nutrition (nutrição)
4. Faça no máximo 4 a 6 perguntas antes de recomendar.
5. Quando estiver pronto para recomendar, responda EXATAMENTE neste formato JSON, sem texto antes ou depois:
{"recommendation": "<specialty>", "reasoning": "<breve explicação em português>"}
6. Se o caso parecer emergência (dor no peito, falta de ar grave, perda de consciência, ferimentos graves), interrompa a triagem e oriente o usuário a ligar 192 imediatamente.
7. Use linguagem acolhedora, simples e brasileira. Não use jargão médico.
8. NÃO recomende mais de uma especialidade por sessão. Se o usuário descrever múltiplos sintomas, escolha o mais urgente ou pergunte qual é o principal.

Comece a conversa pedindo ao usuário para descrever o que está sentindo.`;

If the file already exists with the correct content, make no changes.

prompts.name: extend-chat-session-schema
prompts.description: Add recommendedSpecialty and disclaimerShown fields to ChatSession schema
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing file. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

The Specialty enum already exists at apps/api/src/common/enums/specialty.enum.ts — import it.

Update apps/api/src/chat/schemas/chat-session.schema.ts:
- Keep all existing fields (userId, clinicId)
- Add @Prop({ type: String, enum: Specialty }) recommendedSpecialty?: Specialty;
- Add @Prop({ type: Boolean, default: false }) disclaimerShown: boolean;
- Keep existing index ChatSessionSchema.index({ userId: 1, createdAt: -1 })

Do not change service or controller logic in this prompt — only the schema.

prompts.name: send-message-response-types
prompts.description: Create the response interface for sendMessage with optional recommendation payload

prompts.name: refactor-chat-service
prompts.description: Refactor ChatService to use triage prompt, parse recommendations, and enforce single-recommendation rule
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing file. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

The following already exist — import them, do NOT recreate them:
- TRIAGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT at apps/api/src/chat/constants/triage-prompt.ts (created in prompt 1)
- Specialty enum at apps/api/src/common/enums/specialty.enum.ts
- SendMessageResponse interface at apps/api/src/chat/dto/send-message-response.dto.ts (created in prompt 3)

Update apps/api/src/chat/chat.service.ts:

1. Replace the existing inline SYSTEM_PROMPT constant with the imported TRIAGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT.

2. Update sendMessage signature to return Promise<SendMessageResponse> instead of Promise<ChatMessageDocument>.

3. New logic for sendMessage:
   a. const session = await this.findSessionById(sessionId);
   b. If session.recommendedSpecialty exists, throw new ConflictException('This triage session has already been completed. Start a new session for a new triage.')
   c. Save user message as before
   d. Fetch last MAX_CONTEXT_MESSAGES (existing logic)
   e. Call anthropicClient.messages.create with system: TRIAGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT (instead of old constant)
   f. Extract assistant text as before
   g. Call private method this.parseRecommendation(assistantText) → returns { specialty, reasoning } | null
   h. Save assistant message
   i. If recommendation is not null:
      - session.recommendedSpecialty = recommendation.specialty
      - await session.save()
   j. If !session.disclaimerShown:
      - session.disclaimerShown = true
      - await session.save() (combine with step i if applicable)
   k. Return { message: assistantMsg, recommendation }

4. Add private method parseRecommendation(text: string): { specialty: Specialty; reasoning: string } | null
   - const jsonMatch = text.match(/\{[^{}]*"recommendation"[^{}]*\}/);
   - if (!jsonMatch) return null;
   - try { const parsed = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]); const specialty = parsed.recommendation; if (!Object.values(Specialty).includes(specialty)) return null; return { specialty, reasoning: parsed.reasoning ?? '' }; } catch { return null; }

5. Import ConflictException from '@nestjs/common'.

Do NOT change createSession, listSessions, listMessages, or findSessionById methods.

prompts.name: update-chat-controller
prompts.description: Update chat controller to return new SendMessageResponse type
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing file. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

Update apps/api/src/chat/chat.controller.ts:
- Change the return type of sendMessage from Promise<ChatMessageDocument> to Promise<SendMessageResponse>
- Import SendMessageResponse from '../dto/send-message-response.dto'
- The method body stays the same — it just returns whatever the service returns
- Do not change other methods (createSession, listSessions, listMessages)

prompts.name: extend-chat-tests
prompts.description: Add 7 new tests covering triage logic, recommendation parsing and session-completion enforcement
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing file and check what is already implemented. Do NOT remove existing tests — only ADD new ones. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

Mock TRIAGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT verification by capturing the args passed to mockAnthropicClient.messages.create.

Add these new tests inside the existing describe('ChatService') block:

1. 'sendMessage — uses TRIAGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT'
   - Mock LLM response with simple text
   - Call sendMessage on a fresh session
   - Expect anthropicClient.messages.create to have been called with system === TRIAGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT

2. 'sendMessage — parses recommendation when present and updates session'
   - Mock LLM response: '{"recommendation": "psychology", "reasoning": "o usuário descreveu sintomas de ansiedade"}'
   - Call sendMessage
   - Expect returned recommendation to be { specialty: 'psychology', reasoning: '...' }
   - Expect session.recommendedSpecialty to be saved as 'psychology'

3. 'sendMessage — does not parse when LLM returns plain text'
   - Mock LLM response: 'Pode me contar mais sobre os sintomas?'
   - Expect returned recommendation to be null
   - Expect session.recommendedSpecialty to remain undefined

4. 'sendMessage — rejects unknown specialty'
   - Mock LLM response: '{"recommendation": "cardiology", "reasoning": "..."}'
   - Expect returned recommendation to be null (cardiology not in enum)
   - Expect session.recommendedSpecialty to remain undefined

5. 'sendMessage — blocks new messages after recommendation'
   - Setup: session with recommendedSpecialty already set to Specialty.MEDICINE
   - Call sendMessage
   - Expect ConflictException to be thrown
   - Expect anthropicClient.messages.create to NOT be called

6. 'sendMessage — sets disclaimerShown=true on first message'
   - Setup: session with disclaimerShown=false
   - Mock LLM response with plain text
   - Call sendMessage
   - Expect session.disclaimerShown to be true after the call

7. 'parseRecommendation — extracts JSON when LLM wraps it in surrounding text'
   - This may need to be a separate test calling the private method via type assertion: (service as any).parseRecommendation('Aqui vai: {"recommendation": "nutrition", "reasoning": "abc"} fim')
   - Expect return { specialty: 'nutrition', reasoning: 'abc' }

If the existing tests need updates because the return type of sendMessage changed (now returns SendMessageResponse instead of ChatMessageDocument), update them to access response.message instead of treating the return value as the message directly.
